Precondition: Box_1 is on top of box_2 and both end effectors are free.
Postcondition: Box_1 is grasped by both end effectors.

Precondition: The robot is holding box_1 with both end effectors and the spot left of box_2 on the table is clear.
Postcondition: Box_1 is placed left of box_2 on the table and both end effectors are released.

Precondition: Box_1 is resting on the table left of box_2 and both end effectors are free.
Postcondition: Box_2 is grasped by both end effectors.
